expectations.text: Detects that a related ADR already exists and avoids duplication
expectations.evidence: 'ADR-042 already fully covers this decision.' and 'No new ADR was created — duplication is explicitly prohibited by the skill.'

expectations.text: References the existing ADR by number and explains why no new one is needed

expectations.text: Does not create a duplicate ADR file

expectations.text: Tells the developer what the next step is
